title: Revoke and remove committed JWT from .env
description: The committed .env contains a real-looking JWT in HASS_TOKEN at line 12. Action: (1) alert the user to REVOKE the token in Home Assistant, (2) remove HASS_TOKEN value from .env (replace with placeholder), (3) update .gitignore to ensure .env is excluded, (4) provide instructions to remove from git history (BFG Repo-Cleaner or git filter-repo) — DO NOT run the history rewrite automatically; just stage instructions.
validation: Run `git log --all --full-history -- .env` to confirm file is tracked. Replace HASS_TOKEN value in .env with empty/placeholder. Print warning to user about revoking the token.
